violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation yellow/green residue. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC took ice machine out of service to be washed and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/23/2025

The door to the outside, located in the retail area, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/17/2025

The ice scoop is stored on an unclean surface (top of the ice machine) between uses. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. New Violation. Correct By: 06/23/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC took out of service to be washed and sanitized. Ice disposed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/10/2025

Hard boiled eggs (shells removed) and deli meat sandwiches were observed held between 45-47 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC disposed. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/10/2025

The door to the outside, located in the retail area, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 06/17/2025

Wood is used in the construction for a frame around the 3 bay sink. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. New Violation. Correct By: 06/24/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the microwave have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/10/2025
The receptacle in the toilet room is lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. New Violation. Correct By: 06/17/2025

The floors throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris including back storage and walk-in cooler areas. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/10/2025

Sandwiches, hard boiled eggs and cheese were observed held at 55-61 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC disposed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/14/2023

Thermometers are lacking in the Grab & Go Refrigeration unit. Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 12/28/2023
At the time of inspection, the Grab & Go Refrigerator was at 61°F. PIC took unit out of service. New Violation. Correct By: 12/28/2023

Observed mop to be stored in ware washing sink. If the wash sink is used for functions other than ware washing, such as washing wiping cloths or washing and thawing foods, contamination of equipment and utensils could occur. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 12/15/2023

The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. 1. Shelving throughout establishment 2. Microwave PIC informed. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/28/2023

The facility is lacking an accessible mop sink, as it is located along a narrow passageway along the outside of the walk-in cooler with access blocked by the 3-bay sink. PIC informed. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/21/2021

The floors in the walk-in cooler and ware washing area have an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. PIC informed. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/14/2023
